site.name: globaltimeconvert
site.description: The fastest way to compare time across cities. No ads, no clutter, no cookies.

footer.tagline: A clean, ad-free, cookie-free timezone tool.

common.noCookiesTrackersAds: No cookies, no trackers, no ads.
common.footerTaglineLong: A small, free tool for the world's time zones. Built and maintained by one person.
common.compareIntro: All times shown live. Click any city to open its converter.
common.quickPicksIntro: When it's this time in {a}, it's this time in {b}. Day shifts are noted.

home.title: globaltimeconvert.com — fast, clean timezone conversion
home.subtitle: Search any city. Compare timezones. Schedule across continents. Free, no ads, no tracking — ever.

cityClock.title: Time in {city}, {country} — Current local time
cityClock.intro: {city} is in the {tz} timezone ({offset}). The current local time and date in {city} is shown below.
cityClock.dstNo: {city} does not observe daylight saving time.
cityClock.metaDescription: Current local time in {city}, {country}. Live clock, timezone, and DST info — no ads, no cookies.

cityPair.title: {cityA} to {cityB} Time Converter
cityPair.summarySame: {cityA} and {cityB} are in the same timezone right now.
cityPair.metaDescription: Convert time between {cityA} and {cityB}. {cityA} is {phrase} {cityB}. Compare any time, no ads, no cookies.

about.title: About — globaltimeconvert.com
about.description: Why we built a clean, ad-free, cookie-free timezone tool.
about.p1: Searching for a timezone converter in 2026 still drops you on pages packed with ads, popups, and cookie banners. globaltimeconvert is the opposite proposition: fast, clean, and quietly authoritative.
about.li3: · No cookies, no fingerprinting — and so no cookie banner.
about.li4: · Open about the data we keep (see privacy).
about.li5: · Hosted entirely on Cloudflare's edge for speed.

donate.title: Help keep this thing free — globaltimeconvert.com
donate.description: globaltimeconvert is a side project. If it saved you a few seconds, here's how to support it.
donate.p1: globaltimeconvert is a side project. One person, no funding, no roadmap meetings. The whole thing — the city database, the IANA timezone updates, the six locales, the server bill — is covered out of pocket.
donate.p2: If the site has saved you from doing 13-hours-behind math in your head, or from clicking through three popups on a competitor's page, a small one-time tip is the cleanest way to say thanks. There's no membership, no perks, no newsletter. Just a quieter internet, kept running.
donate.thanks: What sponsors get: an honest thank-you on the about page (if you want one) and the warm feeling of having paid for a tool you actually use. There is no paid tier. There won't be one.

notFound.title: Page not found — globaltimeconvert.com
notFound.description: That page doesn't exist. Try the homepage or search for a city.
notFound.p: The link may be broken, or the city slug isn't in our dataset yet. Try searching from the homepage.
